title: Install intructions: does ccache need configuration?
body:
Hi, I tried to build verilator for the first time today.  I followed the git quick install guide (https://verilator.org/guide/latest/install.html#git-quick-install) but the `make` command tripped on ccache:

```
ccache clang++  -Og -ggdb -gz -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -DVERILATOR_INTERNAL_ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -Qunused-arguments -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c V3Const__gen.cpp -o V3Const__gen.o                                                                                              ccache: error: Failed to create directory /local/ccache/6/e: Permission denied
make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:355: V3Const__gen.o] Error 1
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/david/projects/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[1]: *** [Makefile:85: ../bin/verilator_bin_dbg] Error 2
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/david/projects/verilator/src'
make: *** [Makefile:146: verilator_exe] Error 2
```

does ccache need some configuration?

I found this related env var (but I don't have any directory named `/local`):

```console
$ echo $CCACHE_DIR
/local/ccache
```

So seems like ccache cannot just be used from a fresh install. Not sure how to document this annoyance in the guide though.

(Tested on Ubuntu 22.04)

ccache clang++  -Og -ggdb -gz -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -DVERILATOR_INTERNAL_ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP  -Qunused-arguments -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE=\"\" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR=\"\" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT=\"/usr/local/share/verilator\" -c V3Const__gen.cpp -o V3Const__gen.o                                                                                              ccache: error: Failed to create directory /local/ccache/6/e: Permission denied
make[2]: *** [../Makefile_obj:355: V3Const__gen.o] Error 1
